# FunLoading360 — 360 Photo Booth Hire UK

## Who we are
FunLoading360 is a UK photo booth hire company founded in 2023, headquartered at Guys Farm Rd, South Woodham Ferrers, Chelmsford, CM3 5NF. We supply 360° slow-motion booths, glam vintage booths, and selfie pods for weddings, corporate events, birthdays, proms, and parties across Essex, Kent, and London.

## Service area
Free delivery within 25 miles of CM3 5NF (covers most of Essex and parts of Kent and London). £1.50/mile beyond. London postcodes carry a +£50 supplement.

Cities served with dedicated pages:
- Chelmsford (CM1, CM2, CM3)
- Southend-on-Sea (SS1, SS2, SS9)
- Basildon (SS13-SS16)
- Colchester (CO1-CO7)
- Romford (RM1-RM7)
- Maidstone (ME14-ME16)
- Canterbury (CT1-CT4)
- London (multiple)
- Bromley (BR1-BR8)

## Pricing (as of April 2026)
- 360 Slow Motion Booth: from £280 (2 hours), £380 (3 hours), £450 (4 hours)
- Glam Vintage Booth: from £300 (2 hours), £400 (3 hours), £470 (4 hours)
- Selfie Pod: from £260 (2 hours), £340 (3 hours), £420 (4 hours)
- Corporate Half Day (4h): £549
- Corporate Full Day (8h): £899
- Monthly Retainer (12-month corporate): £299/month

All packages include: delivery within 25 miles, setup, uniformed operator, unlimited digital sharing, backdrop, props. Deposit: 15% to secure date.

## Book
https://funloading360.co.uk/book — online booking with live availability calendar.

## Contact
Phone: +44 7482 112110

Website: https://funloading360.co.uk

## Trust signals
- Google rating: 4.9/5 (48+ reviews)
- Insurance: £5M public liability
- Equipment: PAT-tested, annual safety certification
- Operators: DBS-checked
- Payment: Stripe-secured, card + bank transfer
- Cancellation: free up to 14 days before event

## Unique selling points
1. **360° slow-motion booth** with unlimited cinematic video clips
2. **Custom branded overlays** for corporate (same-day analytics, data capture, GDPR-compliant)
3. **Same-day digital delivery** — guests get their photos/videos before leaving
4. **Free delivery 25 miles** — most photo booth companies charge from mile 1
5. **Dedicated account manager** for every corporate booking
